brand.fontFamily: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"

workflow.name: How can I schedule an agent to run every day and also configure it to receive a name in metadata?
workflow.description: Schedule a daily agent run and add metadata with a name in Browser Use Cloud

steps.title: Navigate to Scheduled Jobs
steps.description: Click on Scheduled Jobs in the sidebar to manage your agent schedules.

steps.title: Open Schedule Agent Dialog
steps.description: Click the Schedule Agent button to start configuring a new scheduled job.

steps.title: Enter Task Description
steps.description: Describe the task you want the agent to perform regularly.

steps.title: Select Schedule Frequency
steps.description: Open the schedule dropdown to choose how often the agent should run.

steps.title: Set Daily Schedule
steps.description: Select the daily frequency option from the dropdown menu.

steps.title: Expand Advanced Options
steps.description: Click on Advanced Options to reveal additional settings like metadata.

steps.title: Configure Agent Metadata
steps.description: Enter the metadata for the agent

steps.title: Create Scheduled Job
steps.description: Click the Create Scheduled Job button to save your new daily schedule and metadata configuration.
